name: colab-remote
description: Operate Colab compute, notebooks, resumable files, and recoverable jobs through the official CLI.

interface.longDescription: Typed OAuth2-only Colab CLI tools for hardware, High-RAM, runtime versions, Python, R, Julia, notebooks, sandboxed Drive storage, resumable files, and recoverable jobs.
capabilities: Linux terminal through the official Colab CLI
Resumable parallel file and folder transfers
Notebook editing and sandboxed Google Drive storage
Progress, silent history, and opt-in notifications
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $operate-colab-remote to run this safely on my authorized Google Colab runtime.
